decisions.reason: The next segment starts a new example after a complete prior sentence, not an obvious sentence completion.
Completes 'It's much more likely to contract disease and then die.'
Completes the question 'Why do we behave the way we behave?'
Completes 'You can build walls around your farm, you can defend yourself a lot easier.'
Completes 'the evidence for this is anthropology...'
Moves 'Because let's' before 'just say...' to complete the sentence starter.
Completes 'We don't find evidence of large violence among different groups.'
Completes the reincarnation sequence ending 'then you're reborn again.'
Completes the site name 'Gobekli Tepe' before the next sentence.
Moves the closing 'okay?' onto the prior sentence about T-shapes representing human beings.
Completes 'as hunter-gatherer, you need to associate with other hunter-gatherers...'
Completes 'some people even chose to stay with them...'
Completes 'years and years and hundreds of people.'
Completes 'they were extremely sophisticated.'
Completes 'what's really interesting about these pictures...'
Completes the list ending 'their wisdom so that they could go hunt as well.'
Moves the trailing 'So,' before 'basically...' to start the next sentence.
Completes 'this must be evidence that Jericho went to war.'
Completes 'what's really important is that this is like right after the last ice age.'
Completes 'And they could see that as magic...'
Completes 'Some place.' before the elaboration 'Another place.'
Completes 'they were just as creative and as sophisticated as we are today.'
Completes 'what's even more interesting is that if you go to every house...'
Completes 'this is a painting that you will see in every house or most houses.'
Completes 'others still believe this is the mother goddess.'
Moves 'So, this' before 'is another picture.'
Completes 'deplete the resources of the area around you.'
Completes 'people develop these religious visions.'
Completes 'we're only slowly discovering all that's there.'
